title: Trap
description: Discover a trap or hazard when exploring a Delve site.

data.value: Alarm: Triggers a loud noise or signal, alerting nearby foes
Pit: Floor gives way; fall and take harm
Snare: Rope or wire yanks you off your feet or suspends you
Spikes: Hidden spikes spring up or out; take harm
Blade: A swinging or thrusting blade; take harm
Crushing walls: Walls close in; get clear or take harm
Falling block: Heavy stone falls; take harm or be pinned
Rolling boulder: Boulder rolls toward you; evade or take harm
Flood: Corridor fills with water; escape or begin to drown
Fire: Flame jets ignite; take harm and area becomes hazardous
Poison gas: Toxic cloud fills the area; Endure Harm or suffer status
Sleep gas: Soporific mist; resist or fall unconscious
Blinding flash: Bright burst; temporarily blinded
Noise-maker: Clanging or crashing racket; lose stealth
Illusion: False image or passage leads you astray
Summoning glyph: Rune calls a creature or spirit
Curse: Magical mark inflicts a lasting condition
Net: Weighted net drops from above; restrained until cut free
Adhesive: Floor or surface is coated with sticky substance; stuck
Portcullis: Iron gate slams down, blocking passage or splitting group
Arrow volley: Hidden mechanism fires arrows; take harm
Electrical shock: Metal surface delivers a jolt; take harm and drop metal items
Collapsing ceiling: Debris rains down; take harm or be buried
Teleport: Mystical trap whisks you to a different part of the site
Combo: Two traps trigger simultaneously — roll twice and both occur
